title: Head of Marketing
description:
Key Responsibilities

Marketing & Growth Strategy

  • Develop and execute a comprehensive marketing strategy aligned to local market needs, trends, and growth opportunities
  • Identify key customer segments, market trends, and competitive insights to drive business growth
  • Establish and strengthen the brand’s position as a leading digital payments provider in Singapore
  • Develop and implement growth marketing initiatives to increase brand awareness and accelerate adoption

Digital & Content Marketing

  • Lead the social media strategy, using content and engagement initiatives to grow the brand’s online presence
  • Own and execute content strategy across digital channels, aligned with business priorities
  • Oversee integrated communications across platforms including website, social media, videos, publications, and marketing collateral
  • Strengthen digital marketing capabilities across organic and paid channels

Brand Partnerships & Stakeholder Support

  • Support the management team on strategic brand partnerships through data-driven marketing insights
  • Conduct performance reviews, deep-dive analysis, reporting, and troubleshooting for strategic partners
  • Coordinate meetings and collaboration with brand partners where required

PR & Communications

  • Design and execute a Public Relations strategy to position the company as a leader in the payments industry
  • Manage media relations and maintain strong relationships with local media
  • Develop and pitch compelling, newsworthy press releases
  • Prepare Q&As and media briefs, and support senior management in media engagements
  • Act as a brand ambassador internally and externally, and company spokesperson where appropriate

Performance & Governance

  • Define, track, and report on key marketing performance metrics
  • Manage marketing budgets effectively to maximise ROI
  • Stay up to date with evolving marketing, communications, and digital best practices and technologies

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Mass Communications, or a related field
  • At least 10  years of experience in marketing communications, with at least 5 years in digital marketing
  • Experience in FinTech, e-commerce, or B2C environments
  • Strong experience in KOL marketing and brand-building initiatives
  • Deep understanding of digital marketing channels, including Google, Facebook, TikTok, Instagram, and email marketing
  • Proven expertise in brand management, lead generation, and multi-channel marketing
  • Strong project management, stakeholder management, and presentation skills
  • Ability to analyse data, think critically, and make informed decisions

postedCompany.description:
Ambition is a leading global recruitment and executive search business operating across key international cities. We access hard-to-find, high-calibre professionals within Banking & Financial Services, Finance & Accounting, Sales & Marketing, Supply Chain & Procurement, and Technology.

We believe our size is a significant differentiation in the recruitment industry. We are big enough to undertake large-scale projects for our clients, yet retain the soul and personality of a smaller company. We are best known for our specialisation with in-depth knowledge and expertise, well-established networks, and deep relationships. We work towards ‘building better futures’ for our clients, candidates and our community.

For more information, please visit www.ambition.com.sg or follow us on Ambition’s social media.
postedCompany.name: AMBITION GROUP SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
